docdb.dbinstance.AutoMinorVersionUpgrade.Description: This parameter does not apply to Amazon DocumentDB. Amazon DocumentDB does not perform minor version upgrades regardless of the value set.  Default: `false`

docdb.dbinstance.AvailabilityZone.Description: The Amazon EC2 Availability Zone that the instance is created in.   Default: A random, system-chosen Availability Zone in the endpoint's AWS Region.  Example: `us-east-1d`

docdb.dbinstance.DBClusterIdentifier.Description: The identifier of the cluster that the instance will belong to.

docdb.dbinstance.DBInstanceClass.Description: The compute and memory capacity of the instance; for example, `db.m4.large`. If you change the class of an instance there can be some interruption in the cluster's service.

docdb.dbinstance.DBInstanceIdentifier.Description: The instance identifier. This parameter is stored as a lowercase string.  Constraints:  + Must contain from 1 to 63 letters, numbers, or hyphens.+ The first character must be a letter.+ Cannot end with a hyphen or contain two consecutive hyphens.Example: `mydbinstance`

docdb.dbinstance.PreferredMaintenanceWin.Description: The time range each week during which system maintenance can occur, in Universal Coordinated Time (UTC).   Format: `ddd:hh24:mi-ddd:hh24:mi`   The default is a 30-minute window selected at random from an 8-hour block of time for each AWS Region, occurring on a random day of the week.   Valid days: Mon, Tue, Wed, Thu, Fri, Sat, Sun  Constraints: Minimum 30-minute window.

docdb.dbinstance.Tags.Description: The tags to be assigned to the instance. You can assign up to 10 tags to an instance.
